title: sida gaya
intro: Sida gaya, also known as the hairy sida, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits associated with sida gaya include its potential to treat fever, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Sida gaya can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to create remedies for various health conditions.
